---
title: "Guild of St. Alban, The"
---

## Guild of St. Alban, The

**Type:** organization

### About

The Guild of St. Alban the Martyr was founded in 1851 by Shirley Fielding Palmer and still existed in 1960;   it consisted of male lay fellows who assisted clergy in social work;  it also had a sisterhood; some archives are in London Metropolitan Archives.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
